description:
Windsurf Cascade IDE Solution

We evaluated this leading tool in 2025 and found it promising. However, since part of the company was acquired by Google DeepMind, they have merged with Devin (Cognition). The combined offering is more capable but also more expensive than the alternatives. The key question is: should we continue using Windsurf or move on?
